Package org.key_project.util.collection

Class DefaultImmutableMap<S,T>

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.util.collection.DefaultImmutableMap<S,T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Iterable<ImmutableMapEntry<S,T>>, ImmutableMap<S,T>
public class DefaultImmutableMap<S,T> extends Object implements ImmutableMap<S,T>
This class implements ImmMap<S,T> and provides a persistent Map. It is a simple implementation like lists
See Also:

    Constructor
    Description
    protected

    creates new map with mapping entry

    creates new map with mapping entry and parent map

  • Constructor Details

    • DefaultImmutableMap

      protected DefaultImmutableMap()
      only for use by NILMap

    • DefaultImmutableMap

      protected DefaultImmutableMap(ImmutableMapEntry<S,T> entry)
      creates new map with mapping entry

    • DefaultImmutableMap

      protected DefaultImmutableMap(ImmutableMapEntry<S,T> entry, DefaultImmutableMap<S,T> parent)
      creates new map with mapping entry and parent map

  • Method Details

    • nilMap

      public static <S, T> DefaultImmutableMap<S,T> nilMap()
      the empty map

    • put

      public ImmutableMap<S,T> put(S key, T value)
      inserts mapping <key,val> into the map (old map is not modified) if key exists old entry has to be removed null is not allowed for key or value.
      Specified by:
      put in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
      Parameters:
      key - a S to be used as key
      value - a T to be stored as value
      Returns:
      a ImmMap<S,T> including the <key, value> pair and all other pairs of the current map with keys different from the given key

    • get

      public T get(S key)
      Specified by:
      get in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
      Returns:
      value of type T that is mapped by key of type S

    • size

      public int size()
      Specified by:
      size in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
      Returns:
      number of entries as int

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      returns true if the map is empty
      Specified by:
      isEmpty in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
      Returns:
      true iff the map is empty

    • containsKey

      public boolean containsKey(S key)
      Specified by:
      containsKey in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
      Returns:
      true iff the map includes key

    • containsValue

      public boolean containsValue(T value)
      Specified by:
      containsValue in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
      Returns:
      true iff the map includes value

    • remove

      public DefaultImmutableMap<S,T> remove(S key)
      removes mapping (key,...) from map
      Specified by:
      remove in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
      Returns:
      the new map (the same if key is not in the map)

    • removeAll

      public ImmutableMap<S,T> removeAll(T value)
      removes all mappings (...,value) from map
      Specified by:
      removeAll in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
      Returns:
      the new map (the same if value is not mapped)

    • keyIterator

      public Iterator<S> keyIterator()
      Specified by:
      keyIterator in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
      Returns:
      iterator for all keys

      public Iterator<T> valueIterator()
      Specified by:

      Returns:
